title: Design Landing Page
description: Create responsive landing page UI using Angular and Tailwind CSS. Ensure mobile-first approach and accessibility compliance.

title: Implement Authentication
description: Develop login and registration functionality with form validation and JWT-based authentication flow.

title: Setup Task API Service
description: Create Angular service using HttpClient to fetch, add, update, and delete tasks from local JSON file.

title: Build Dashboard UI
description: Design and implement dashboard with charts, statistics cards, and task summary widgets.

title: Write Unit Tests
description: Add Jasmine/Karma unit tests for task service and components with minimum 80% coverage.
